title: migracion_proyecto.py: one-command harness migration to another repo (HTML explainer section 10 as code)
description: Create .harness/bin/migracion_proyecto.py (stdlib only, py3.9+). Usage: python3 .harness/bin/migracion_proyecto.py <target-dir> [--dry-run] [--force]. It executes the 3-step recipe from docs/harness-explainer.html section 10: (1) COPY MACHINERY: .harness/bin/ (all CLIs incl. itself), .harness/README.md, .claude/settings.json hooks, .claude/agents/, .claude/skills/harness-status, ORCHESTRATION.md, USAGE.md. (2) RESET STATE in the target: fresh blackboard.json (empty tasks{}, generation from source state.json, one announcement recording the migration origin+date), fresh state.json (KEEP schema/limits/human_gates/agents.registry; ZERO reputation, run counters null, evolution: generation preserved, empty pending/accepted lists but a note citing the source repo and its generation, empty next_audit_inputs), empty locks/ and tasks/ dirs, fresh empty logs/events.jsonl+transcript.jsonl, NO session_holders.json, template plan.md and task.json. (3) INTEGRATE: if target has CLAUDE.md append the source CLAUDE.md between clear BEGIN/END UNIVERSAL-HARNESS markers (never overwrite; skip with notice if markers already present), else copy it; append .gitignore entries for .harness/logs/*.jsonl and locks if target is a git repo (create .gitignore if missing, dedupe lines). SAFETY: refuse if target dir does not exist; refuse if target/.harness exists unless --force; --force backs up existing .harness to .harness.bak-<n> (rename, never delete - human gate compliance); --dry-run prints the full action plan and touches NOTHING; never modifies the SOURCE repo; clear final report of what was copied/reset/skipped + next steps for the human (open Claude Code in target, pose the goal). Owned file: .harness/bin/migracion_proyecto.py ONLY. Acceptance: (a) --dry-run against a scratch target prints plan, zero writes (verify via find -newer); (b) real run against a fresh scratch git repo in the session scratchpad: afterwards, IN THE TARGET, blackboard.py status shows an empty gen-N board with the migration announcement, add-task/claim/lock/handoff cycle works, session.py register works, hooks file + agents + docs present, CLAUDE.md merged with markers, .gitignore appended; (c) re-run without --force -> refused; with --force -> .harness.bak-1 created, no deletion; (d) py_compile clean; (e) the script itself lands in the target's bin/ (self-propagating).

notes.note: plan: build migracion_proyecto.py per T-032.json contract (copy machinery, reset state, integrate CLAUDE.md/.gitignore), then probe a-e in scratchpad target

IMPLEMENTED. Script: 390 lines, stdlib-only (argparse/copy/shutil/pathlib + harness_common). Structure: _copy_machinery (bin/ + README + .claude/settings.json+agents+skills/harness-status + ORCHESTRATION.md + USAGE.md), _reset_state (fresh blackboard.json+state.json deriving generation/limits/human_gates/agents.registry from the CURRENT source state.json, no hardcoding; reputation={}, run counters null, evolution.generation preserved w/ provenance note, empty pending/accepted/next_audit_inputs; empty locks/+tasks/ dirs; empty logs/*.jsonl; NO session_holders.json; template plan.md+task.json), _integrate (CLAUDE.md merge via BEGIN/END UNIVERSAL-HARNESS markers, never overwrite, skip-with-notice if markers present; .gitignore dedup-append if target is git repo). Safety: refuse if target missing; refuse if target/.harness exists unless --force; --force renames (never deletes) to .harness.bak-N; --dry-run gates every write behind a not-dry check. Exit codes 0/1/2 (argparse gives 2 for bad args).

PROBES a-e replayed against SCRATCH=/private/tmp/.../scratchpad/migracion-target (session scratchpad, git-init'd, dummy CLAUDE.md + src/main.py). (a) dry-run: 'python3 .harness/bin/migracion_proyecto.py $SCRATCH --dry-run' -> exit 0, printed full 18-line action plan; 'find $SCRATCH -newer $MARKER' -> empty (zero writes); git status in scratch clean. (b) real run: exit 0; then IN $SCRATCH ran full cycle: blackboard.py status (empty gen-2 board + migration announcement, generation carried from source state.json harness_generation=2), add-task T-001, claim T-001, lock.py acquire/release src/main.py, update in_progress, handoff to verifier, session.py register/list/unregister -- all succeeded, events.jsonl in the TARGET recorded all 8 events (proves hc.ROOT resolved to the target, not the source). .claude/settings.json+agents/+skills/harness-status present; CLAUDE.md tail ends with UNIVERSAL-HARNESS END marker (dummy CLAUDE.md preserved above it, source CLAUDE.md appended below); .gitignore got the 5 dedup'd lock/log ignore lines. (c) re-run w/o --force -> exit 1 refused, .harness untouched; re-run --force -> .harness renamed to .harness.bak-1 (T-001.json + 8 events.jsonl lines preserved inside, nothing deleted), fresh .harness written; CLAUDE.md/.gitignore correctly SKIPPED on the second pass (idempotent -- markers/lines already present). (d) py_compile clean before and after all probes. (e) migracion_proyecto.py itself present at $SCRATCH/.harness/bin/migracion_proyecto.py after the copy (self-propagating). Source repo check: git status --short shows only expected substrate churn from blackboard.py/lock.py CLI calls (blackboard.json, state.json, new tasks/T-032.json) plus a PRE-EXISTING uncommitted diff in docs/harness-explainer.html (mtime predates this task's claim, about T-031/verifier-rotation -- not touched by me, no Edit/Write call was made on it, only a Read). My owned file .harness/bin/migracion_proyecto.py is the only file I wrote or edited.

HANDOFF -> verifier: Replay: (1) python3 -m py_compile .harness/bin/migracion_proyecto.py -> clean. (2) mkdir a fresh git-init'd scratch dir with a dummy CLAUDE.md + one source file (outside this repo, e.g. under the session scratchpad or /tmp). (3) touch a marker file, sleep 1, run 'python3 .harness/bin/migracion_proyecto.py <scratch> --dry-run' from THIS repo root -> expect exit 0, full action plan printed, and 'find <scratch> -newer <marker>' empty (zero writes), git status in scratch stays clean. (4) run 'python3 .harness/bin/migracion_proyecto.py <scratch>' (no flags) -> exit 0; then cd <scratch> and run: blackboard.py status (expect empty gen-N board matching this repo's state.json harness_generation, 1 migration announcement citing this repo's path+generation+date), add-task --id T-001 ... --agent x, claim T-001 --agent x, lock.py acquire/release <a file> --holder x --task T-001, update --status in_progress --note ..., handoff --to-role verifier, session.py register/list/unregister -- all should succeed and <scratch>/.harness/logs/events.jsonl should show the events (proves the copied bin/ resolves ROOT to the NEW repo, not the source). Verify .claude/settings.json+agents/+skills/harness-status/SKILL.md exist in <scratch>; CLAUDE.md ends with '<!-- END UNIVERSAL-HARNESS -->' and the dummy content above it is untouched; .gitignore has the 5 new lock/log ignore lines; <scratch>/.harness/bin/migracion_proyecto.py exists (self-propagation). (5) re-run 'migracion_proyecto.py <scratch>' without --force -> expect exit 1 refusal, .harness untouched. Re-run with --force -> expect exit 0, <scratch>/.harness.bak-1 created via rename (verify its tasks/T-001.json and logs/events.jsonl survive, i.e. nothing was deleted), fresh .harness written, and the CLAUDE.md/.gitignore steps report SKIP (idempotent, markers/lines already present) on this second pass. (6) In THIS repo run 'git status --short' -> expect only .harness/blackboard.json, .harness/state.json (normal CLI churn from claim/update/handoff) and the new .harness/tasks/T-032.json + .harness/bin/migracion_proyecto.py as changes; docs/harness-explainer.html shows a PRE-EXISTING uncommitted diff unrelated to this task (predates my claim, not touched by me -- verify via 'git log -1 --format=%cd -- docs/harness-explainer.html' vs this task's claim timestamp). All 5 acceptance probes (a-e) from T-032.json observed passing; see task notes for the full transcript.

verifier-c (F6 rotation, filesystem-hostility lens) replaying probes a-e on fresh scratch targets + attacks i-vi (file-not-dir, no-git, cwd-independence, merge idempotence, pre-existing settings.json overwrite, source untouched)

VERIFIED (verifier-c, F6 filesystem-hostility lens; independent verifier, producer=substrate-worker-2; override used only because I set in_progress under my own id for tracking). ALL 5 acceptance criteria pass. (a) dry-run exit 0, full plan, find -newer empty + git clean = zero writes. (b) real run exit 0; full CLI lifecycle IN target (status/add-task/claim/lock acquire+release/update/handoff/session register+list+unregister) all succeeded and the TARGET's own events.jsonl recorded all 6 board events -> proves copied bin/ resolves ROOT (parents[2] of file location) to the NEW repo, source events.jsonl untouched. settings.json+agents(5)+skills/harness-status/SKILL.md+ORCHESTRATION.md+USAGE.md present; CLAUDE.md original content preserved, harness wrapped in BEGIN/END markers; .gitignore original lines preserved + 5 harness lines appended; session_holders.json correctly NOT pre-created. (c) re-run w/o --force = exit 1 refusal, .harness intact; --force = BACKUP by rename to .harness.bak-1, ALL old data preserved (T-001.json + events survive in backup), NOTHING deleted. (d) py_compile clean before+after. (e) migracion_proyecto.py self-propagates into target bin/. HAZARD HUNT: no rm/rmtree/unlink anywhere -- only rename for backup, first-free .bak-n; all writes target-side, source read-only; cwd-independent; partial-death leaves .harness that safely refuses re-run w/o --force. ATTACKS: (i) file-not-dir refused exit 1 file untouched; (ii) no-git=.gitignore SKIP not created; (iii) unrelated cwd=source resolved correctly; (iv) idempotence=markers count 1, gitignore line count 1; (vi) source git status = only blackboard/state (verifier churn) + untracked migracion_proyecto.py + tasks/T-032.json; explainer.html diff is coordinator's pre-existing edit. active_role: grep found NO CLI/hook reads it; target fully functional without it -> documented deviation ACCEPTED. DISCIPLINE: producer locked owned file (acq 01:51:33 rel 01:57:53), handed off to verifier not self-done. FINDING (attack v, non-blocking spec-gap not defect): pre-existing target .claude/settings.json / ORCHESTRATION.md / USAGE.md SILENTLY OVERWRITTEN (verified user MY_CUSTOM_HOOK + Bash(ls) perm destroyed, reported as bland [COPY], no backup/warn); colliding-name agents clobbered, non-colliding survive. Contract lists these under COPY MACHINERY with no preserve req (reserves 'never overwrite' only for CLAUDE.md + .harness gate) -> contract-compliant -> ACCEPT. RECOMMEND follow-up: back-up/merge/warn on pre-existing .claude/settings.json; reconcile CLAUDE.md 2B active_role ref vs non-seeded file.
